blended.narrative: Pats Peak is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.5 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,117 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
